title: 研究型 agent：web_search + code_execution 组合

body.overview: 研究型 agent 将两个 server tool 配对使用：web_search 负责从网上获取最新信息，code_execution 负责对信息进行计算和分析。适合既需要实时数据又需要复杂计算的任务，例如「比较五大云厂商本季度财报」。

components.name: web_search
components.role: 发现阶段——在网上搜索数据源和最新信息

components.name: code_execution
components.role: 处理阶段——用 Python 对搜索结果做汇总、制表或可视化

body.flow: 1. Claude 调用 web_search 搜索相关信息 → 2. Claude 编写 Python 代码调用 code_execution 处理数据 → 3. 如果第一轮搜索有遗漏，可再次搜索补充 → 4. 返回最终分析结果。两个工具都在服务端执行，客户端无需管理沙箱。

body_en.overview: A research agent pairs two server tools: web_search to find up-to-date information and code_execution to analyze it. This fits tasks that need both live data and nontrivial computation, such as 'compare this quarter's earnings across the top five cloud providers.'

components.name: web_search
components.role: Discovery phase — search the web for data sources and current information

components.name: code_execution
components.role: Processing phase — write Python to tabulate, summarize, or visualize the results

body_en.flow: 1. Claude calls web_search for relevant information → 2. Claude writes Python and invokes code_execution to process data → 3. Optionally searches again if the first pass had gaps → 4. Returns final analysis. Both tools run server-side, so there's no client sandbox to manage.
